title: Entropy CMP Pack
description: The official pack of the Entropy CMP
body:
The official modpack for the Entropy CMP.
Make sure to check for updates regularly!
Includes many mods to enhance gameplay. Some of the more notable mods:
- Chisels and Bits: Chip pixels out of blocks to create ultra-detailed builds!
- Tons of biome and world-generation mods, generating a beautiful world to build in, and Distant Horizons to see it all
- Plasmo Voice: Voice chat to communicate with other players easily
- Loads of performance mods to run as smoothly as possible
